problem: Can superconductivity be achieved at room temperature — what material structure?
mechanism: Plasma confinement via magnetic mirror geometry
hypothesis: Plasma confinement via magnetic mirror geometry may resolve Can superconductivity be achieved at room temperature — what material structure? by activating at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: Bench-top proof of concept with 7 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
